subcodes.first_line: The Sun hath risen from the horizon of proof, and the Nightingale of divine knowledge hath warbled upon the branches, and the Spirit hath called aloud [3.5s]... ...I testify before God to the greatness, the inconceivable greatness of this Revelation. Again and again have We in most of Our Tablets
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اشرقت الشمس من افق البرهان و غنت عندلیب العرفان علی الافنان و نادی الروح
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
